justifications.completeness: All expected fields are populated with substantive content — 5 AI opportunities, 4 stakeholders, 5 opening questions, and a full risk register.
justifications.accuracy: Recommendations are well-aligned with stated challenges; ROI figures are clearly marked as estimates rather than guarantees.
justifications.actionability: An SE could walk into a Meridian Bank meeting tomorrow using this brief — questions are specific, stakeholder tips are tactical, and objections are pre-handled.
justifications.hallucination_risk: Minor risk on ROI numbers (R$4.2M, R$8.1M) which appear model-generated rather than sourced — recommend flagging as estimates in customer-facing use.

top_strength: Actionability is exceptional — the stakeholder engagement tips and opening questions are highly specific to financial services and ready to use.
top_improvement: Add source citations or confidence levels to ROI estimates to reduce hallucination risk before sharing with customers.
